task_completion.description: Navigate to the Quality Control Points list and locate the original QCP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality app is open, and the 'Quality Control Points' list view or the specific form view for 'Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors' is visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate the duplication of the original QCP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Action' menu is opened with 'Duplicate' selected, or a new unsaved QCP form is visible containing the copied data from the original QCP.

task_completion.description: Set the name of the duplicated QCP to the target name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title/Name field of the new QCP form contains exactly 'Surface Quality Check - Large Cabinet'.

task_completion.description: Set the linked product of the duplicated QCP to the target product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product field in the new QCP form is set to 'Large Cabinet'.
The new QCP form is in a saved/read-only state (e.g., absence of the 'Save' button, presence of an 'Edit' button, or a save confirmation indicator).

task_completion.description: Ensure the original QCP remains unchanged in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Quality Control Points list view displays both 'Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors' (linked to 'Cabinet with Doors') and 'Surface Quality Check - Large Cabinet' (linked to 'Large Cabinet').

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo graphical user interface to perform the duplication and edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Odoo UI elements (menus, form fields, buttons) being clicked and typed into, rather than terminal windows executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the Odoo application URL, and the interface matches the Odoo web client, not a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots, and the progression of screens shows a natural flow of navigating, duplicating, editing, and saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source Quality Control Point (QCP) is named 'Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors' and is linked to the product 'Cabinet with Doors'. The agent must duplicate this QCP to create a new one named 'Surface Quality Check - Large Cabinet' linked to the product 'Large Cabinet'. The original QCP must remain completely unchanged. Both QCPs should exist in the system at the end of the task.
